# Frequency / Transform Domain

**Path:** `global_descriptor/handcrafted/frequency_transform`

Handcrafted descriptors using Fourier, Radon, sinogram, or related transform-domain representations.

## Scope

**Include:** frequency-domain scan context; Radon sinogram

**Exclude:** ordinary spatial histogram without transform-domain matching
